name: Roo Code — Custom modes
description: Custom Roo Code modes for code review and documentation workflows.

name: Roo Code — .rooignore
description: Standard ignore patterns to keep sensitive files out of Roo Code context.
content:
# Dependencies
node_modules/

# Build output
dist/
build/
.next/

# Environment
.env
.env.*

# Logs
*.log

# Large files
*.zip
*.tar.gz
package-lock.json
pnpm-lock.yaml
